title: CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala)
shortInfo: Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala) Recruitment 2026: Centre for Management Development Kerala has released the official notification for 2 Senior Project Engineer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala)
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala) Recruitment 2026: Centre for Management Development Kerala has released the official notification for 2 Senior Project Engineer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Civil Engineering from a recognised University
qualification.details: Graduation in Civil Engineering from a recognised University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Project Engineer post is 05-06-2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Senior Project Engineer position in the Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for the Senior Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation in Civil Engineering from a recognised University to be eligible for the Senior Project Engineer post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Engineer post is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Project Engineer position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Engineer role will involve a Proficiency Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Project Engineer position is on a contract basis as per the official notification released by CMD Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the direct application link provided. Ensure all details are accurate and upload necessary documents before the last date.
